blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 261 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 41°F.
